summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CityBlend Google Places API integration. All backend APIs working correctly with real Google data. Frontend displays places with actual travel times from Google Distance Matrix API.

minor.issue: Returns city='Unknown' for NYC coordinates (40.7128, -74.0060) - geocoding may need result_type adjustment

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) - returns CityBlend API
Backend API health endpoint (/api/health) - returns healthy
Google Places API - /api/places returns source='google'
Google Places API - places have google_place_id field
Google Distance Matrix API - places have walk_mins, drive_mins, walk_text, drive_text
Google Geocoding API - /api/places/location returns location data
Cannabis strains endpoint - returns 9,523 strains
Cannabis dispensaries endpoint - returns 2,334 dispensaries
Cannabis stats endpoint - returns strain/dispensary counts
Reviews endpoint - /api/reviews/place/{id} returns reviews
Reviews auth - POST /api/reviews requires authentication (401)
Categories endpoint - returns 8 categories
Nearby places endpoint - /api/places/nearby works
Frontend Home page loads with authenticated user
Frontend displays 20 place cards from Google API
Frontend shows travel times (walk_mins, drive_mins) on cards
Frontend category filters work (For You, Eat, Drink, Culture, Views, Nature, Coffee, Markets)
Frontend map view toggle works
Frontend feed view toggle works
Frontend search input works
Frontend place detail page loads with full info
Frontend place detail shows distance, walk time, drive time
Frontend Cannabis/Greens page loads with strains and dispensaries
Frontend bottom navigation works (Explore, Greens, Saved, You)
seed_data_creation: Created test user with onboarding_completed=true and taste_profile for authenticated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Places API integration is fully working. Travel times come from Google Distance Matrix API (indicated by walk_text and drive_text fields). Test user created in MongoDB for authenticated testing. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend displays real Google Places data with actual travel times.

key_findings.google_places_api: Working - returns real NYC places with source='google'
key_findings.distance_matrix_api: Working - provides actual walk_mins, drive_mins with text descriptions
key_findings.geocoding_api: Partially working - returns data but city='Unknown' for NYC coordinates
key_findings.reviews_api: Working - GET returns reviews, POST requires auth
key_findings.frontend_integration: Working - displays Google Places data with travel times
